misc_summary: This file contains legitimate miscellaneous content including the table of contents, publication information (Relief Society Magazine masthead, subscription details, contact information), and numerous period advertisements for local Salt Lake City businesses including Bennett Glass & Paint Co., Keeley's Ice Cream, Southern Pacific Lines, Paris Co., shoe repair services, home building loans, medical services, L.D.S. Business College, musical instruments, laundry services, insurance, dairy products, and hosiery. All potential article content (Armistice Hymn, Rheims Cathedral frontispiece) has already been extracted as standalone files.
